name: usage-trace
description: Trace keyword usage, call chains, and database tables in Java/Spring, Python, or C# with an offline HTML report. Auto-trigger for prompts like 分析当前项目的 orderId, 查找字段使用情况, 追踪调用链, 字段流向.

interface.shortDescription: Trace field usage / call chains / DB tables. Triggers: 分析当前项目的 orderId, 查找字段使用情况, 调用链追踪.
interface.longDescription: Install once via marketplace plugin. When the user says things like 分析当前项目的 orderId or Trace storeNo usage, load the skill, ensure the usage-trace CLI is available (pip install from GitHub if needed), and generate a single offline HTML report with usage sites, call chain, and database tables. 支持中文：分析当前项目、查找字段使用情况、追踪调用链、字段流向分析。
defaultPrompt: 查找 storeNo 字段项目使用情况
追踪 userId 的调用链和涉及的数据库表
Trace orderId usage in the current project
Analyze storeNo call chain and related tables
where is userId used and which tables does it touch?
